visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white fuzzy cardigan and a pleated brown dress, stands in front of a shelf filled with boxed pastries. She claps her hands together and smiles while looking at the products. The background shows large warehouse shelves, cardboard boxes, and other shoppers in the distance. (2) The camera zooms in on several plastic containers of spiral-shaped red bean pastries. A price tag on the shelf clearly displays "RED BEAN PASTRY 6CT $399". The woman picks up one of the boxes and holds it close to the camera, pointing at the red beans visible on the surface. (3) The setting shifts to a cozy indoor room with soft lighting. Two women are seated at a white table. One is the previous woman, and the other wears a black top and a black-and-white patterned bucket hat. They open the pastry box, take out the bread, and tear it apart with their hands to show the inner texture. They take large bites, nod their heads, and give thumbs-up gestures toward the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 為什麼拍手. (2) [Variety]: 銷量超好!. [Subtitle]: 紅豆奶油酥. 而且只剩下三盒. (3) [Subtitle]: 哎我的天吶. 趕快拿多一點. 現在還那麼早. 現在還不到. 現在7點就剩3盒了. 天吶而且是平日的時間. 一定很好吃. 回去試吃看看. (4) [Subtitle]: 這有6大個. 然後是399元. (5) [Subtitle]: 蜜紅豆奶油酥. 6入399一個是66.5塊錢. 上面有滿滿的蜜紅豆. 我們來加熱吃看看. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個呢我加熱了145度三分鐘. 用空氣炸鍋出來的. 我覺得是剛好這樣酥酥脆脆的. 然後裡面又熱熱的那種. (7) [Subtitle]: 你們看這個千層的酥皮. 然后它這個麵包呢. 裡面雖然沒有餡料. 以一個66.5塊的話你會覺得有點失望. (8) [Variety]: 不會讓你失望. [Subtitle]: 可是你咬下去呢不會讓你失望. 因為它中間的那個空氣感的夾層. 就像你在吃可頌一樣. (9) [Subtitle]: 重點是上面那一層蜜紅豆烤的酥酥. 就像波蘿麵包上面的波蘿皮一樣. 就是你咬下去整個搭配是剛剛好非常有味道. (10) [Variety]: 好市多黑馬. [Subtitle]: 我覺得它是好市多黑馬真的很好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators; approximately 3 background shoppers visible in the warehouse section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white fuzzy cardigan over a brown dress. A second Asian woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is in a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and price tags. The second half is in a clean indoor dining/living area with white walls and a simple wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks quickly in Mandarin. The background contains a rhythmic pop electronic track with a steady 4/4 beat. The environment sounds like a large indoor space with a slight reverb. (2) A subtle plastic rustling sound occurs as an object is touched. The speaker's pitch rises further, expressing excitement about finding a product. The music continues without interruption. (3) A second female voice enters the mix, engaging in a conversational tone. Distinctive sounds of pastry bread being torn open (soft, muffled crunches) are audible. The ambient noise floor drops, indicating a smaller, quieter indoor room. The phase concludes with clear vocalizations of enjoyment and nodding agreement through short affirmative sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review a specific bakery item from Costco (Red Bean Pastry) by highlighting its scarcity and showcasing a positive taste test experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of price, packaging, and brand (Costco), followed by a highly positive review and 'thumbs up' recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media 'discovery' tropes, emphasizing low stock and high popularity to create a sense of urgency for the viewer.
